title: dactylorhiza longibracteata subsp. sudetica
intro: Dactylorhiza longibracteata subsp. sudetica is a rare, terrestrial orchid species found in the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of inflammation and pain, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza longibracteata subsp. sudetica include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which may help in alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its roots in water, which can be used as a tea or added to other herbal remedies to enhance their effects.
